odeProperty.value: A historical performance at the English classroom
Thanks to this learning resource, students will be able to talk about food traditions in Ancient Rome as well as the customs and society at that time.

odeComponent.htmlView:
Welcome to the Roman Feast!

Welcome, students! Long ago, people in Ancient Rome enjoyed special meals with family and friends. They ate different foods, played games, and celebrated important events together. Get ready to travel back in time and discover how the Romans liked to eat, celebrate, and have fun!
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1781387545233-hko62kyzh","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

Welcome to the Roman Feast!

\n

Welcome, students! Long ago, people in Ancient Rome enjoyed special meals with family and friends. They ate different foods, played games, and celebrated important events together. Get ready to travel back in time and discover how the Romans liked to eat, celebrate, and have fun!

","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
Are you ready for a party? (Ancient Roman party actually...)

Check the table below!

odeComponent.htmlView:
A lo largo del proyecto usaremos Internet para buscar información, trabajar de forma cooperativa... Como sabéis, en el mundo tecnológico también existen peligros. 

Mira la infografía y comenta con tu compañero el apartado que consideras más importante a tener en cuenta en el contexto escolar.
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1781474296907-0vod4wepe","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

A lo largo del proyecto usaremos Internet para buscar información, trabajar de forma cooperativa... Como sabéis, en el mundo tecnológico también existen peligros. 

\n

Mira la infografía y comenta con tu compañero el apartado que consideras más importante a tener en cuenta en el contexto escolar.

","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

{"ideviceId":"idevice-1781474913053-972sikqc4","img_0":{"img":"{{context_path}}/content/resources/ChatGPT Image 15 jun 2026, 00_15_32.png","thumbnail":"{{context_path}}/content/resources/ChatGPT Image 15 jun 2026, 00_15_32.png","title":"","linktitle":"","author":"Imagen creada con IA","linkauthor":"","license":""}}

odeComponent.htmlView:
ATTENTION LITTLE ROMANS! 🏛️

Ha llegado vuestra misión más importante: viajaréis en el tiempo hasta la Antigua Roma para convertiros en organizadores de un gran banquete romano. Tendréis que investigar cómo eran estas celebraciones, qué comían los romanos, cómo decoraban la mesa y qué costumbres seguían durante la comida.

Después, usando vuestra creatividad, recrearéis vuestro propio banquete. Podréis diseñar los platos, elaborar el menú, preparar la decoración e incluso explicar quiénes serían los invitados y cómo se divertirían durante la fiesta. No se trata solo de copiar información, sino de imaginar que sois ciudadanos romanos y dar vida a una experiencia única.

¿Seréis capaces de impresionar al mismísimo emperador con vuestro banquete? Demostrad vuestro ingenio, trabajad en equipo y preparaos para descubrir que la Historia puede ser una aventura deliciosa. 

Have great fun!
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1781475621437-cbcgdbycr","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

ATTENTION LITTLE ROMANS! 🏛️

Ha llegado vuestra misión más importante: viajaréis en el tiempo hasta la Antigua Roma para convertiros en organizadores de un gran banquete romano. Tendréis que investigar cómo eran estas celebraciones, qué comían los romanos, cómo decoraban la mesa y qué costumbres seguían durante la comida.

Después, usando vuestra creatividad, recrearéis vuestro propio banquete. Podréis diseñar los platos, elaborar el menú, preparar la decoración e incluso explicar quiénes serían los invitados y cómo se divertirían durante la fiesta. No se trata solo de copiar información, sino de imaginar que sois ciudadanos romanos y dar vida a una experiencia única.

¿Seréis capaces de impresionar al mismísimo emperador con vuestro banquete? Demostrad vuestro ingenio, trabajad en equipo y preparaos para descubrir que la Historia puede ser una aventura deliciosa. 

Have great fun!

","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
To help you with your Roman Banquet Project, I am sharing a selection of useful links where you can find information about food, dining customs, and social life in Ancient Rome.

Please read the information carefully, take notes, and select the most relevant facts for your project. Remember to use reliable sources and acknowledge any information you include in your work.

Padlet

Symbaloo
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1781735036567-r9i6cwboj","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

To help you with your Roman Banquet Project, I am sharing a selection of useful links where you can find information about food, dining customs, and social life in Ancient Rome.

Please read the information carefully, take notes, and select the most relevant facts for your project. Remember to use reliable sources and acknowledge any information you include in your work.

Padlet

Symbaloo

","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
Transcript

Welcome back to Delicious History, the podcast about the history of food. Today, I want to talk about Ancient Roman dinner parties. These parties were  important social events for rich Romans. The parties were in big, beautiful rooms and they were usually very long. You probably sit on a chair during meals. You don't lie on sofas and eat. But ancient Romans were on sofas for the whole meal!

It was also normal to eat with your hands. And what about the menus at these dinner parties? Well, some of the food was similar to today. Eggs, fish, chicken and other types of meat were popular. Dessert was usually fruit and cake. But some food was very unusual. For example...dormice! These are small animals from the rat family!   

Lectura facilitada

Welcome back to Delicious History! Today, we are going to learn about dinner parties in Ancient Rome.

Rich Romans loved having big dinner parties. They invited their friends and family to eat together in  beautiful rooms. The parties often lasted a long time.

When you eat, you probably sit on a chair. But the Romans did something different. They lay on sofas while they ate!

Romans usually ate with their hands. They enjoyed foods like eggs, fish, chicken, and meat. For dessert, they often had fruit and cake.

Some Roman foods were quite strange. One unusual food was dormice. Dormice are small animals that look a bit like mice!

Audio

Welcome back to Delicious History, the podcast about the history of food. Today, I want to talk about Ancient Roman dinner parties. These parties were  important social events for rich Romans. The parties were in big, beautiful rooms and they were usually very long. You probably sit on a chair during meals. You don't lie on sofas and eat. But ancient Romans were on sofas for the whole meal!

It was also normal to eat with your hands. And what about the menus at these dinner parties? Well, some of the food was similar to today. Eggs, fish, chicken and other types of meat were popular. Dessert was usually fruit and cake. But some food was very unusual. For example...dormice! These are small animals from the rat family!
Roman meals

{}

Watch the video and answer the questions.

Tiempo por pregunta: 00:00
Puntuación.

odeComponent.htmlView:
Imagine you are an ancient Roman chef. Design a Canva in which you include Starters, First Course, Main Course and Desserts for the people in Rome.

Write at least 3 ingredients on each section.

Use an appropriate template.
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1781822526971-ivyq6j3e7","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

Imagine you are an ancient Roman chef. Design a Canva in which you include Starters, First Course, Main Course and Desserts for the people in Rome.

\n

Write at least 3 ingredients on each section.

\n

Use an appropriate template.

","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
Let's write the script (guión) for next week performance! In your groups, keep the following instructions in mind:

-Include humour and interesting facts naturally.

-Make the scene lively.

-Include historical details.

-Structure the script: beginning, middle and end.

-Add stage directions. For example: (Servant carries a tray)

Use Google Docs and share a document with your classmates to add your contribution.
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1781823000855-auonw29pq","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

-Include humour and interesting facts naturally.

-Make the scene lively.

-Include historical details.

-Structure the script: beginning, middle and end.

-Add stage directions. For example: (Servant carries a tray)

Use Google Docs and share a document with your classmates to add your contribution.

","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
Título At the Roman feast
Descripción

En esta unidad didáctica el alumnado deberá investigar sobre las características de un banquete romano, así como las costumbres y la organización de estas celebraciones. Además, se estudiarán las diferencias entre clases sociales. 

Como producto final, representarán el banquete en clase con una adecuada caracterización y puesta en escena.
Autora María Moral Colomo
Licencia de uso Licencia Creative Commons Reconocimiento No comercial Compartir igual 4.0
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1781968197582-g1wva7vzy","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"
Título At the Roman feast
Descripción

En esta unidad didáctica el alumnado deberá investigar sobre las características de un banquete romano, así como las costumbres y la organización de estas celebraciones. Además, se estudiarán las diferencias entre clases sociales. 

Como producto final, representarán el banquete en clase con una adecuada caracterización y puesta en escena.
Autora María Moral Colomo
Licencia de uso Licencia Creative Commons Reconocimiento No comercial Compartir igual 4.0
